subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Hifz
subcodes.first_line: This is a Book wherein is recorded that which the Spirit hath inspired within Me, and verily it is a revelation from God and a token of His remembrance unto them that have acknowledged God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب یذکر فیه ما الهمنی الروح و انه لتنزیل من الله و آیه ذکره للذینهم اقروا بالله و
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @call to action, @spiritual transformation
